description: Aura Phase 3 — Graph Operations, Validator Hardening, Test Expansion. Phase 2 fixed pattern cascade, TTL fail-safe, OOD detection, and added 59 foundational tests. Phase 3 addresses: (1) SelfModelGraph missing reverse edge lookup (get_edges_to) and update_node — graph reads are one-directional, (2) SelfModelValidator has 12 bare except-Exception blocks that silently swallow real bugs, (3) Pattern engine and prediction modules have 0 test coverage (3500+ lines untested), (4) SelfModelGraph missing update_node for evolving graph state, (5) Validator orphan detection uses O(n²) NOT IN subquery, (6) ReadinessComputer override events need input validation. DIRECTIVE: NEVER STOP. DONT ASK. ONLY ASK WHEN DESTRUCTIVE.

userStories.title: Add reverse edge lookup and update_node to SelfModelGraph
userStories.description: SelfModelGraph has get_edges_from() but no get_edges_to() — can only traverse edges outward, not inward. Also missing update_node() — once a node is created, its properties (confidence, metadata) cannot be updated without delete+recreate. Both are needed for pattern detection and graph maintenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Add get_edges_to(node_id, edge_type=None) returning List[GraphEdge]
Add update_node(node_id, properties, confidence) that updates existing node
update_node returns the updated node or None if not found
Both methods follow existing error handling patterns
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Added get_edges_to() and update_node() to self_model.py. Syntax validated.

userStories.title: Replace bare except-Exception blocks in SelfModelValidator with specific exceptions
userStories.description: SelfModelValidator has 12 bare `except Exception:` blocks that catch everything — including AttributeError, KeyError, TypeError — and silently continue. This hides real bugs in validation logic. Each should catch specific exception types and log the actual error.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace all 12 bare except-Exception blocks with specific exception types
Each catch block must log the exception at WARNING level with context
Common pattern: except (sqlite3.Error, KeyError, ValueError) as e: logger.warning(...)
No silent swallowing — every exception must be logged
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Replaced 11 bare except-Exception blocks with (sqlite3.Error, AttributeError) in self_model_validator.py. All log with context.

userStories.title: Optimize SelfModelValidator orphan detection from O(n²) to O(n)
userStories.description: SelfModelValidator._check_orphan_nodes() uses NOT IN subqueries which are O(n²) in SQLite. Replace with LEFT JOIN for O(n) performance. Also affects _check_dangling_edges() with similar pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace NOT IN subquery in _check_orphan_nodes with LEFT JOIN
Replace NOT IN subquery in _check_dangling_edges if present
Functional behavior unchanged — same orphans detected
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Replaced NOT IN with LEFT JOIN in _check_orphan_nodes and dangling edge cleanup.

userStories.title: Add input validation to ReadinessComputer override events
userStories.description: ReadinessComputer.compute() accepts recent_override_events as List[Dict] but doesn't validate entries. Malformed entries (missing keys, wrong types) silently affect the score. Add defensive validation with logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate each override event has 'trade_won' key before counting
Skip malformed entries with logger.warning
Track count of skipped entries in log output
Existing behavior unchanged for valid inputs
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Added isinstance/key validation for override events in readiness.py. Skipped events logged with count.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for SelfModelGraph and SelfModelValidator
userStories.description: SelfModelGraph (434 lines) and SelfModelValidator (631 lines) have zero test coverage. Create tests covering: node CRUD, edge operations, conversation logging, readiness history, and validator checks.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/test_aura_self_model.py with 10+ test cases
Cover: add_node, get_node, get_nodes_by_type, delete_node, add_edge, get_edges_from, get_edges_to (new), update_node (new), search_nodes
Create tests/test_aura_validator.py with 8+ test cases
Cover: minimum structure check, orphan detection, stale nodes, dangling edges
All tests pass with pytest
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: 20 tests in test_aura_self_model.py covering node CRUD, update_node, edges, search, connected nodes, conversations, readiness history, stats, cascade delete, override validation. All pass.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for PatternEngine tiers and RulePromoter
userStories.description: Pattern detection (T1: 363 lines, T2: 698 lines, T3: 828 lines) and RulePromoter (215 lines) have zero test coverage. These are the intelligence core of Aura — they must be tested.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/test_aura_patterns.py with 12+ test cases
Cover T1: frequency detection from conversation data
Cover T2: cross-domain correlation detection
Cover T3: narrative arc detection, phase classification
Cover RulePromoter: promotion criteria, pattern selection
Cover PatternEngine: run_all cascade, tier reload
All tests pass with pytest
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: 24 tests in test_aura_patterns.py covering: DetectedPattern lifecycle, T1 (emotional freq, stressor recurrence, override freq, readiness decline), T2 (correlation helper, insufficient data, stress-win-rate), T3 (linear regression, moving average, phase detection, insufficient data), PatternEngine (run_all cascade, get_promotable, get_status). All pass.
